title: Causal Decomposition
tagline: An interactive tree that pulls an event into cause and effect on two axes at once — with cycles where causes feed back on themselves

functionality.name: Dual-axis decomposition
functionality.blurb: Pulls an event apart into cause and effect along two axes at once, with time running sideways and composition running down.

functionality.name: Wormhole cycles
functionality.blurb: Includes looping "wormhole" cycles where causes feed back on themselves.

functionality.name: Interactive tree
functionality.blurb: Presents the decomposition as an interactive tree of an event's causes and effects.

detail_body: An interactive tree that pulls an event apart into its causes and effects along two axes at once: time runs sideways while composition runs down.
It also handles looping "wormhole" cycles — cases where causes feed back on themselves.
